mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontVoteMapper.selectFrontVoteList */ SELECT VOTE_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ /**/ , MEMBER_SEQ /**/ , COMMENT /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM VOTE

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontVoteMapper.selectFrontVotePage */ SELECT VOTE_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ /**/ , MEMBER_SEQ /**/ , COMMENT /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM VOTE

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontVoteMapper.selectFrontVote */ SELECT VOTE_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ /**/ , MEMBER_SEQ /**/ , COMMENT /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM VOTE WHERE VOTE_SEQ = #{voteSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontVoteMapper.updateFrontVote */ UPDATE VOTE SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq} /**/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq} /**/ , MEMBER_SEQ = COALESCE(#{memberSeq}, #{registerSeq}) /**/ , COMMENT = #{comment} /**/ WHERE VOTE_SEQ = #{voteSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontVoteMapper.deleteFrontVote */ UPDATE VOTE SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE VOTE_SEQ = #{voteSeq}
